images.label: A distinctive ancient robe in a pastoral family setting
images.prompt_used: Create a respectful symbolic image of a distinctive ancient robe laid out or held up in a pastoral family setting, representing Joseph’s special robe. Premium semi-realistic painterly Bible learning app style, warm light, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Distinctive ancient robe laid out or held up in a pastoral family setting

images.label: Gathered grain sheaves with one standing prominently
images.prompt_used: Create a symbolic scene of gathered grain sheaves in a field, with one central sheaf standing prominently among others, representing Joseph’s dream about sheaves. Premium semi-realistic painterly style, ancient agrarian setting, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Gathered grain sheaves in a field with one central sheaf standing prominently

images.label: Flocks near distant hills in the Dothan area
images.prompt_used: Create an ancient pastoral scene with flocks near distant hills, representing Joseph going to find his brothers near Dothan. Premium semi-realistic painterly Bible learning app style, clear mobile-card composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Ancient pastoral scene with flocks near distant hills

images.label: An Egyptian household courtyard with a young overseer
images.prompt_used: Create a respectful symbolic scene of an ancient Egyptian household courtyard with a young servant/manager figure overseeing work, representing Joseph serving in Potiphar’s house. Premium semi-realistic painterly style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Ancient Egyptian household courtyard with a young overseer figure
